description: Lock wooden_dugout_canoe_refinement to sourced hollowed-log boat craft and a direct woodworking prerequisite.

checks.reason: The date remains anchored to the Mesolithic Pesse-canoe chronology rather than to all earlier inferred watercraft.
Earlier boats remain lineage context, not a one-to-one mechanism.
A shaped hollowed-log hull requires basic wood shaping.
The broad advanced-stone-tools ancestor is represented through the direct woodworking prerequisite instead of a second immediate edge.
